    Index

    A B C D E F G I L M O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addInvoice(Invoice) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Adds an invoice to the Customer's list of invoices Decreases the available money of the Customer based on the total amount on the Invoice.
    addInvoice(Invoice) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to add invoices to invoiceList
    addOverhead(double, double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Adds tax revenue and the costs of membership discounts
    addRevenue(String, double, double, double, double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Adds revenue to a ticket tier whenever a ticket is purchased
    appendTextToDisplay(String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Public method to append text to the display area.
    Arena - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Arena class represents an arena venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    Arena() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Arena
    Default constructor for Arena class
    Arena(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Arena
    Constructor for Arena class with name parameter
    Arena(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Arena
    Constructor for Arena class with name and capacity parameters
    Arena(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Arena
    Constructor for Arena class with type, name, and capacity parameters
    Auditorium - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Auditorium class represents an auditorium venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    Auditorium() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
    Default constructor for Auditorium class
    Auditorium(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
    Constructor for Auditorium class with name parameter
    Auditorium(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
    Constructor for Auditorium class with name and capacity parameters
    Auditorium(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
    Constructor for Auditorium class with type, name, and capacity parameters
    AutoPurchase - Class in com.runticket.service
    Handles automatic ticket purchasing.
    AutoPurchase() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.AutoPurchase
     

    B

    buyTickets(ConcurrentHashMap, ConcurrentHashMap, String) - Method in class com.runticket.service.PurchaseTickets
    Method to facilitate the ticket purchasing process for a customer

    C

    calculateTotalAmount() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Calculates the total amount for the invoice including tax, member discounts, and fees
    cancelOrder(ConcurrentHashMap, ConcurrentHashMap, String) - Method in class com.runticket.service.PurchaseTickets
    Method to facilitate the order cancellation process for a customer It refunds the customer (excluding fees) and updates the event and customer records accordingly.
    closeLogger() - Method in class com.runticket.service.Logger
     
    com.runticket - package com.runticket
    RunTicket Application Includes models, views, controllers, and services for managing ticket sales.
    com.runticket.controller - package com.runticket.controller
    Set of controllers for the RunTicket application.
    com.runticket.model - package com.runticket.model
    Models for the RunTicket application.
    com.runticket.service - package com.runticket.service
    Services for the RunTicket application.
    com.runticket.view - package com.runticket.view
    Views for the RunTicket application.
    Concert - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Concert class represents a concert event and extends the Event class.
    Concert() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Concert
    Default constructor for Concert class
    Concert(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Concert
    Constructor for Concert class with name parameter
    Concert(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Concert
    Constructor for Concert class with name and ID parameters
    Concert(String, int, Venue) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Concert
    Constructor for Concert class with name, ID, and venue parameters
    ConsoleView - Class in com.runticket.view
    The ConsoleView class handles all console output for the TicketMiner application.
    ConsoleView() - Constructor for class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
     
    Customer - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Customer class represents a customer with personal details, membership status, balance, and a list of invoices for purchased tickets.
    Customer() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Default constructor for Customer class
    Customer(String, String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Constructor for Customer class with first and last name parameters
    Customer(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Constructor for Customer class with first name, last name, and customer ID parameters
    CustomerController - Class in com.runticket.controller
    The CustomerController class handles customer-related operations including login and ticket purchasing.
    CustomerController(SwingView) - Constructor for class com.runticket.controller.CustomerController
    Constructor for CustomerController
    CustomerListStrategy - Class in com.runticket.service
    The CustomerListStrategy class implements the FileParsingStrategy interface to extract customer data from a file and populate a HashMap of Customer objects.
    CustomerListStrategy() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.CustomerListStrategy
     
    CustomerReceipt - Class in com.runticket.service
    Represents a customer receipt for an automatic or manual ticket purchase.
    CustomerReceipt(String, String, String, String, String, int, double) - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.CustomerReceipt
    Constructor to initialize a CustomerReceipt object with the provided details.

    D

    displayAllFees(double, double, double, double) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays fee information for all events
    displayAutoPurchaseLoading(String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays a loading/processing message in the details panel while auto purchase is running.
    displayAutoPurchaseResults(List, int, int, int) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays auto purchase results in the details panel.
    displayAvailableEvents(ConcurrentHashMap) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Updates the events table in the main window with the provided list of events.
    displayAvailableEvents(HashMap) - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays available events.
    displayBalance(double) - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays customer balance.
    displayBalance(double) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    displayCustomerGreeting(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays customer greeting.

    displayCustomerInfo(Customer) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays customer information in the details panel.
    displayCustomerMenu() - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays customer menu options
    displayCustomerMenu() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    displayCustomers(ConcurrentHashMap) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Updates the customers table in the main window with the provided list of customers.
    displayCustomerWelcome() - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays customer welcome message

    displayError(String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays error message.
    displayError(String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    displayEventAddedConfirmation(Event) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays a confirmation message and the event details after successfully adding an event
    displayEventCancellationResults(Event, int, double) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays event cancellation results

    displayEventDatePrompt() - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView

    Displays fee information for a specific event

    Prompts for event name

    displayEventNotFound() - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays event not found message

    displayEventRevenue(Event) - Method in class com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
    Displays event revenue information.
    displayEventRevenue(Event) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Displays detailed revenue report for a specific event in the details panel.

    Prompts for event time

    Prompts for fireworks cost

    Displays all invoices of the customer

    Displays a list of invoices in the details panel.

    Overloaded method for backward compatibility - clears panel by default

    E

    Event - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Event class represents an event with details such as name, date, time, type, cost, venue, tickets, seating, and invoices.
    Event() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Event
    Default constructor for Event class
    Event(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Event
    Constructor for Event class with name parameter
    Event(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Event
    Constructor for Event class with name and ID parameters
    Event(String, int, Venue) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Event
    Constructor for Event class with name, ID, and venue parameters
    EventController - Class in com.runticket.controller
    The EventController class handles event-related operations including inquiries and additions.
    EventController(SwingView) - Constructor for class com.runticket.controller.EventController
    Constructor for EventController
    EventListStrategy - Class in com.runticket.service
    The EventListStrategy class implements the FileParsingStrategy interface to extract event data from a file and populate event and venue lists.
    EventListStrategy() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.EventListStrategy
     
    eventRevenue() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to print the event's financial information
    exitProgram() - Static method in class com.runticket.RunTicket
    Exits the program after updating data.
    expectedProfit() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to calculate and return the event's expected profit
    extractCustomerData(File, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.CustomerListStrategy
    Extracts customer data from a file and populates the customerList HashMap
    extractCustomerData(File, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.EventListStrategy
    Extracts customer data - not applicable for this strategy, and so it won't do anything but display a message saying that this strategy cannot extract Customer data
    extractCustomerData(File, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Extracts customer data from a file using the current parsing strategy
    extractCustomerData(File, Map) - Method in interface com.runticket.service.FileParsingStrategy
    Extracts customer data from a file
    extractCustomerData(File, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.UpdateDataStrategy
    Won't do anything since this strategy only updates data
    extractEventData(File, Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.CustomerListStrategy
    Extracts event data - not applicable for this strategy and so it won't do anything but display a message that says that it cannot extract Event Data.
    extractEventData(File, Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.EventListStrategy
    Extracts event data from a file and populates the event and venue lists.
    extractEventData(File, Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Extracts event data from a file using the current parsing strategy
    extractEventData(File, Map, Map) - Method in interface com.runticket.service.FileParsingStrategy
    Extracts event data from a file
    extractEventData(File, Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.UpdateDataStrategy
    Won't do anything since this strategy only updates data,

    F

    Festival - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Festival class represents a festival event and extends the Event class.
    Festival() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Festival
    Default constructor for Festival class
    Festival(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Festival
    Constructor for Festival class with name parameter
    Festival(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Festival
    Constructor for Festival class with name and ID parameters
    Festival(String, int, Venue) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Festival
    Constructor for Festival class with name, ID, and venue parameters
    Field - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Field class represents a field venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    Field() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Field
    Default constructor for Field class
    Field(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Field
    Constructor for Field class with name parameter
    Field(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Field
    Constructor for Field class with name and capacity parameters
    Field(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Field
    Constructor for Field class with type, name, and capacity parameters
    FileParsingContext - Class in com.runticket.service
    The FileParsingContext class utilizes the Strategy design pattern to handle different file parsing strategies.
    FileParsingContext() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Default constructor for FileParsingContext class
    FileParsingContext(FileParsingStrategy) - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Constructor for FileParsingContext class with strategy parameter
    FileParsingStrategy - Interface in com.runticket.service
    The FileParsingStrategy interface defines methods for parsing event and customer data from files and updating data.

    G

    getBalance() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's balance
    getBronzePrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's Bronze tier ticket price
    getCharityFee() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the charity fee
    getCharityFees() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the total charity fees collected for the event
    getConcertsPurchased() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the number of concerts purchased by the customer
    getConvenienceFee() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the convenience fee
    getConvenienceFees() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the total convenience fees collected for the event
    getCustomer() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
     
    getCustomerAction() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    getCustomerID() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's ID
    getCustomerInvoices() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's invoices
    getCustomerList() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Information
    Gets the customer list.
    getCustomerRefund() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the amount to be refunded to the customer, not including fees
    getDiscountCosts() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's discounts costs
    getDoubleInput(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Gets double input from user via input form.
    getEvent() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Gets the event associated with this invoice.
    getEventCost() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's total cost
    getEventDate() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's date
    getEventID() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's ID
    getEventList() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Information
    Gets the event list.
    getEventName() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's name
    getEventRefund() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the amount to be deducted from the event due to refunds
    getEventTicketProfit() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the profit made by the event from the ticket sale, not including fees or tax
    getEventTime() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's timer
    getEventType() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's type
    getEventVenue() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's venue
    getExpectedRevenue() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's expected revenue
    getFireworkCost() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's fireworks costs
    getFireworks() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns wheter the event will have fireworks or not
    getFirstName() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's first name
    getFullRefund() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the full refund amount including all fees (used for event cancellation)
    getGAPrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's General Adminission tier ticket price
    getGoldPrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's Gold tier ticket price
    getInformation() - Static method in class com.runticket.model.Information
    Gets the singleton instance of the Information class.
    getIntInput(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Gets integer input from user via input form.
    getInvoice(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Gets a specific invoice by its ID
    getInvoiceID() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the invoice ID
    getInvoiceList() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's invoice list
    getLastName() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's last name
    getLogger() - Static method in class com.runticket.service.Logger
    getLogger() returns the logger Double checks to make sure that only one logger exist initializes the logger if it does not exist
    getMainFrame() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    getMemberDiscount() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
     
    getMemberStatus() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's membership status
    getPassword() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's password
    getPercentage() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    getPrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    getPrices() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to print the ticket prices according to tier
    getPurchaseMenu() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    getQuantity() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    getRoleSelection() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    getSeatsLeft(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns how many seats are left for a given ticket type
    getSeatsSold(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to return the number of seats sold in each tier
    getSilverPrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's Silver tier ticket price
    getStringInput(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Gets string input from user via inline form in control panel.
    getSysadminMenuSelection() - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
     
    getTax() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
     
    getTaxRevenue() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's tax revenue
    getTicket() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
     
    getTicketFee() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the ticket fee
    getTicketFees() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the total ticket fees collected for the event
    getTicketNum() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
     
    getTicketPrice(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to return the price for a ticket tier
    getTicketsRevenue(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to return the revenue of a tier
    getTier() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    getTotalFees() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the total fees collected for the event
    getTotalSavings() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's lifetime savings due to membership discounts
    getTransactionCount() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the number of transactions made by the customer
    getUsername() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Returns the customer's username

    Gets the venue list.

    getView() - Method in class com.runticket.controller.TicketController
    Gets the SwingView instance used by this controller.
    getVIPPrice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Returns the event's VIP tier ticket price

    I

    Information - Class in com.runticket.model
    Singleton class that holds the main data structures for events, customers, and venues.
    Invoice - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Invoice class represents an invoice for a ticket purchase by a Customer for a specific event.
    Invoice(Customer, Tickets, Event) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Constructor for Invoice class with customer, ticket, and event parameters

    L

    Log(String) - Method in class com.runticket.service.Logger
    Logs the specified action to a file named "Log.txt"
    Logger - Class in com.runticket.service
    The Logger class is responsible for logging actions taken within the ticketing system.
    login(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Validates customer login credentials

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.runticket.RunTicket
    The main method initializes the TicketMiner application, loads data from files, activates the autopurchasers, starts the controller, and updates the data when the program is exited.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.runticket.TestSwingView
     

    O

    OpenAir - Class in com.runticket.model
    The OpenAir class represents an open air venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    OpenAir() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Default constructor for OpenAir class
    OpenAir(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Constructor for OpenAir class with name parameter
    OpenAir(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Constructor for OpenAir class with name and capacity parameters
    OpenAir(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Constructor for OpenAir class with type, name, and capacity parameters
    Outdoor - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Outdoor class represents an outdoor venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    Outdoor() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Default constructor for Outdoor class
    Outdoor(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Constructor for Outdoor class with name parameter
    Outdoor(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Constructor for Outdoor class with name and capacity parameters
    Outdoor(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Constructor for Outdoor class with type, name, and capacity parameters

    P

    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Arena
    Prints information about the Arena
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
    Prints information about the Auditorium
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Concert
    Prints information about the Concert
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Prints information about the Customer
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Abstract method that will print out event-specific information
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Festival
    Prints the Festival information
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Field
    Prints information about the Field venue
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Prints information about the Open Air Venue
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Prints information about the Outdoor venue
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Sport
    Prints information about the Sport Event
    printInfo() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Stadium
    Prints information about the Stadium
    printInfo() - Method in interface com.runticket.model.Venue
    Prints the venue information
    printInvoice() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Prints the invoice details including customer information, event details, ticket information, and total amount
    processFile(String, ConcurrentHashMap, ConcurrentHashMap) - Method in class com.runticket.service.AutoPurchase
    Reads and processes all automatic ticket purchases from CSV file.
    PurchaseTickets - Class in com.runticket.service
    The PurchaseTickets class handles the ticket purchasing process for customers.
    PurchaseTickets() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.PurchaseTickets
     
    PurchaseTickets(SwingView) - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.PurchaseTickets
    Constructor for PurchaseTickets with GUI view

    R

    refund(Invoice, String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to process a refund for a given invoice The method updates the event's financials and seating accordingly Only the fees are non-refundable Removes the invoice from the invoice list
    refund(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Processes a refund for a specific invoice by its ID returns the refunded amount to the customer's balance, decreases the number of concerts purchased and total savings accordingly, and removes the invoice from the customer's list.
    refundFull(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Processes a full refund for a specific invoice by its ID (including all fees) Used when an event is cancelled.
    returnTotal() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Invoice
    Returns the total amount
    RunTicket - Class in com.runticket
    The RunTicket class is the main entry point for the TicketMiner application.
    RunTicket() - Constructor for class com.runticket.RunTicket
     

    S

    saveReceiptToFile() - Method in class com.runticket.service.CustomerReceipt
    Saves the receipt summary to a text file inside the "receipts" folder.
    saveReceiptToGenerated8Folder() - Method in class com.runticket.service.CustomerReceipt
    Saves the receipt summary to a text file inside the "receipts/generated8Receipts" folder.
    seatsLeft() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to print out the number of seats left according to tier
    seatsSold(String, int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to add the number of seats sold according to tier when a transaction is made It also substract the number of seats left in the chosen tier
    setBalance(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's balance
    setConcertsPurchased(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the number of concerts purchased by the customer
    setCustomerID(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's ID
    setDiscountCosts(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's discounts costs, the costs caused by membership discounts
    setEventCost(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's total cost
    setEventDate(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's date
    setEventID(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's ID
    setEventName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's name
    setEventTime(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's time
    setEventType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's type
    setEventVenue(Venue) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's venue
    setExpectedRevenue(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the expected revenue for the event
    setFees(int, int, int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the fees for the event.
    setFireworks(boolean) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets wheter the event will have fireworks or not
    setFireworksCost(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's fireworks costs
    setFirstName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's first name
    setLastName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's last name
    setMemberStatus(boolean) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's membership status
    setParsingStrategy(FileParsingStrategy) - Method in class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Sets the file parsing strategy
    setPassword(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's password
    setPercentage(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    setPrice(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    setQuantity(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
    sets the ticket quantity
    setSeats() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to set the percentage of seats according to tier.
    setTaxRevenue(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Sets the event's total tax revenue
    setTickets(String, double, double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Event
    Method to set the prices and percentages for each ticket tier.
    setTier(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Tickets
     
    setTotalSavings(double) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    sets the customer's lifetime savings due to membership discounts
    setTransactionCount(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the number of transactions made by the customer
    setUsername(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Customer
    Sets the customer's username
    setVenue(String, String, int) - Static method in class com.runticket.service.VenueFactory
    Creates and returns a Venue object based on the specified type, name, and capacity.
    setVenueCapacity(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Arena
     
    setVenueCapacity(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
     
    setVenueCapacity(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Field
    sets the venue's capacity
    setVenueCapacity(int) - Method in class com.runticket.model.OpenAir

    setVenueName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Field
    sets the venue's name
    setVenueName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Sets the name of the open air venue
    setVenueName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Sets the name of the outdoor venue
    setVenueName(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Stadium
     
    setVenueName(String) - Method in interface com.runticket.model.Venue
     
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Arena
     
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Auditorium
     
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Field
    sets the venue's type
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.OpenAir
    Sets the type of the venue
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Outdoor
    Sets the type of the venue
    setVenueType(String) - Method in class com.runticket.model.Stadium
     
    setVenueType(String) - Method in interface com.runticket.model.Venue
     
    setView(SwingView) - Method in class com.runticket.service.PurchaseTickets
    Sets the GUI view for displaying messages and getting input
    showOptionDialog(String, String, String[]) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Shows option buttons inline in control panel for user selection.
    showYesNoDialog(String, String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Shows yes/no buttons inline in control panel.
    Sport - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Sport class represents a sport event, inheriting from the Event class.
    Sport() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Sport
    Default constructor for Sport class
    Sport(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Sport
    Constructor for Sport class with name parameter
    Sport(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Sport
    Constructor for Sport class with name and ID parameters
    Sport(String, int, Venue) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Sport
    Constructor for Sport class with name, ID, and venue parameters
    Stadium - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Stadium class represents a stadium venue with a name, type, and capacity.
    Stadium() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Stadium
    Default constructor for Stadium class
    Stadium(String) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Stadium
    Constructor for Stadium class with name parameter
    Stadium(String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Stadium
    Constructor for Stadium class with name and capacity parameters
    Stadium(String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Stadium
    Constructor for Stadium class with type, name, and capacity parameters
    start() - Method in class com.runticket.controller.TicketController
    Starts the main application loop with GUI
    start() - Method in class com.runticket.controller.TicketControllerGUI
    Starts the main application loop with GUI.
    SwingView - Class in com.runticket.view
    The SwingView class handles all GUI output for the TicketMiner application using Java Swing.
    SwingView() - Constructor for class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Constructor for SwingView - initializes the GUI
    switchView(String) - Method in class com.runticket.view.SwingView
    Switches the view to show events, customers, details, or log

    T

    TestSwingView - Class in com.runticket
    Simple test class to demonstrate the SwingView GUI This opens the GUI window so you can see it works without modifying your controllers To run: Right-click this file -> Run As -> Java Application
    TestSwingView() - Constructor for class com.runticket.TestSwingView
     
    TicketController - Class in com.runticket.controller
    The TicketController class is the main controller for the TicketMiner application.
    TicketController() - Constructor for class com.runticket.controller.TicketController
    Constructor for TicketController Initializes the view and the Customer and Event controllers
    TicketControllerGUI - Class in com.runticket.controller
    GUI Version of TicketController - Uses SwingView instead of ConsoleView This is the same as TicketController but uses SwingView for GUI display.
    TicketControllerGUI() - Constructor for class com.runticket.controller.TicketControllerGUI
    Constructor for TicketControllerGUI - uses SwingView.
    Tickets - Class in com.runticket.model
    The Tickets class represents a ticket with a tier, price, quantity, and percentage available.
    Tickets() - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Tickets
    Default constructor for Tickets class
    Tickets(String, double) - Constructor for class com.runticket.model.Tickets
    Constructor for Tickets class with tier and price parameters

    U

    updateData() - Method in class com.runticket.model.Information
    Public method to trigger the update of customer and event data.
    updateData(Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.CustomerListStrategy
    Updates customer and event data - not applicable for this strategy and so it won't do anything but display a message that says that it cannot update data.
    updateData(Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.EventListStrategy
    Updates customer and event data - not applicable for this strategy, and so it won't do anything but display a message saying that this strategy cannot update data.
    updateData(Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
    Updates data using the current parsing strategy
    updateData(Map, Map) - Method in interface com.runticket.service.FileParsingStrategy
    Updates data to a file
    updateData(Map, Map) - Method in class com.runticket.service.UpdateDataStrategy
    Updates event and customer data to new CSV files
    UpdateDataStrategy - Class in com.runticket.service
    The UpdateDataStrategy class implements the FileParsingStrategy interface to provide functionality for updating event and customer data to files.
    UpdateDataStrategy() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.UpdateDataStrategy
     

    V

    Venue - Interface in com.runticket.model
    The Venue interface defines the methods that any venue type must implement.
    VenueFactory - Class in com.runticket.service
    The VenueFactory class is responsible for creating Venue objects based on the provided type, name, and capacity.
    VenueFactory() - Constructor for class com.runticket.service.VenueFactory
     

    W

    welcomeSysadmin() - Method in class com.runticket.controller.EventController
    Handles the welcome process for system administrators (GUI version) Lets sysadmin view users, view events, enquire about events, add new events, run the autopurchaser, and exit
    welcomeUser() - Method in class com.runticket.controller.CustomerController
    Handles the welcome process for customers (GUI version) Lets user login, view events, purchase tickets, view their invoices, cancel orders, and logout
    A B C D E F G I L M O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages
